phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar tickets?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah kom-PRAR TEE-kehts

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if summit permits are available today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿quedan permisos para subir al pico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿KEH-dahn pehr-MEE-sohs PAH-rah soo-BEER al PEE-koh?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the main panel.

responses.english: It is indicated on the main panel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get the summit permit
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo consigo el permiso para la cima?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh kohn-SEE-goh EHL pehr-MEE-soh PAH-rah LAH THEE-mah

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, with prior reservation.

responses.english: At the ticket office, with prior reservation.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper station exit is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la salida de la estación superior?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah sah-LEE-dah deh lah eh-stah-SYOHN soo-peh-ree-YOHR?

likely_response.local: Siga el pasillo principal hasta la salida.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL pah-SEEL-loh preen-thee-PAHL AH-stah LAH sah-LEE-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the main hallway to the exit.

responses.english: Follow the main hallway to the exit.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL pah-SEEL-loh preen-thee-PAHL AH-stah LAH sah-LEE-dah
responses.local: Siga el pasillo principal hasta la salida.
